arabic: أَرَدْنَا تَجْرِبَةَ التَّخْيِيمِ لِأَوَّلِ مَرَّةٍ فَاخْتَرْنَا مَكَانًا فِي الْغَابَةِ. نَصَبْنَا الْخِيَامَ قَبْلَ غُرُوبِ الشَّمْسِ بِصُعُوبَةٍ بَسِيطَةٍ. أَشْعَلْنَا نَارًا وَطَبَخْنَا الطَّعَامَ عَلَيْهَا. فِي اللَّيْلِ نَظَرْنَا إِلَى النُّجُومِ وَتَحَدَّثْنَا طَوِيلًا. اسْتَيْقَظْنَا مَعَ أَصْوَاتِ الطُّيُورِ فِي الصَّبَاحِ الْبَاكِرِ.
translation: Htjeli smo iskusiti kampovanje po prvi put pa smo izabrali mjesto u šumi. Postavili smo šatore prije zalaska sunca s malo teškoće. Zapalili smo vatru i kuhali hranu na njoj. Noću smo gledali zvijezde i dugo razgovarali. Probudili smo se uz zvukove ptica u rano jutro.
translationEn: We wanted to experience camping for the first time and chose a spot in the forest. We set up the tents before sunset with a little difficulty. We lit a fire and cooked food on it. At night we looked at the stars and talked for a long time. We woke up to the sound of birds in the early morning.
